/usr/bin/ar qc libqcommon.a CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/common.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/msg.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/md4.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/vm.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/files.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/huffman.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/cmd.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/cvar.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/net_chan.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/cm_load.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/cm_polylib.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/cm_patch.c.o CMakeFiles/qcommon.dir/src/qcommon/cm_test.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libqcommon.a
